title: Visor Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Unlimited rewards minting via vulnerable require() check in vVISR Rewards Contract's deposit() function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls vVISR.mint() after transferring ownership to the calling contract in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls vVISR.mint() after transferring ownership to the calling contract in the same tx
summary: An attacker exploited a vulnerability in Visor Finance's vVISR Rewards Contract by transferring ownership to their own contract and minting unlimited shares, resulting in the loss of 8.8M VISR worth $8.2M. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for ownership transfers followed by minting.
